steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: We want yards, and we know 1 yard = 36 inches. To convert inches to yards, divide by 36: $$\frac{756}{36}$$

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices
steps.content:
• A: 0.048 — This comes from dividing 36 ÷ 756, inverting the conversion. Eliminated.
  • B: 21 — Dividing 756 by 36 gives 21. That is the correct answer.
  • C: 720 — This is 756 − 36, which is subtraction rather than conversion. Eliminated.
  • D: 27,216 — This is 756 × 36, multiplying instead of dividing. Eliminated.
